name: mcp-server-anilist
description: An MCP server integrating AniList API for anime and manga information.

rating.reason: The toolset has clear, descriptive names and good parameter documentation with proper type constraints and examples. Most descriptions adequately explain functionality and include helpful context like login requirements and usage notes. However, many descriptions are quite brief (1-2 sentences) and could benefit from more comprehensive explanations of what information is returned, usage contexts, and limitations. The complex filter objects in search tools have excellent detailed parameter documentation that elevates the overall quality.
